Mobile Detailing Near Me in Columbia & Lexington SC (2026 Guide)

By Mikah Albertson — updated 2026-03-20

How to Find the Best Mobile Detailing Near Me

Searching mobile detailing near me returns dozens of results, but not every detailer is worth your time or money. Here is what to look for before you book:

  • Google reviews with photos. A legitimate detailer near you should have at least 20 verified Google reviews averaging 4.8 stars or higher, with real before-and-after photos attached.
  • Proof of insurance. Any mobile detailer working on your vehicle should carry general liability insurance. Ask for it — a reputable shop will share it without hesitation.
  • IDA certification. The International Detailing Association (IDA) sets the professional standard for the industry. IDA-certified detailers are trained in proper techniques that protect your paint rather than damage it.
  • Transparent pricing. If a detailer near you won't list prices online or give you a firm quote before showing up, that is a red flag. Look for clear package descriptions with starting prices.
  • A real portfolio. Ask to see work they have done on vehicles similar to yours. Photos should be recent and unfiltered.

Mikah's Mobile Detailing checks every one of those boxes. We are 5-star rated on Google, fully insured, IDA certified, and post our pricing publicly. When you search car detailing near me in the Columbia and Lexington SC area, you will find us at the top because our results speak for themselves. Read what our customers say on our reviews page.

What Is Mobile Car Detailing & How Does It Work?

Mobile car detailing near me means the detailer comes to your location — your home driveway, office parking lot, apartment complex, or anywhere else your car is parked. There is no need to drive anywhere, wait in a lobby, or arrange alternative transportation while your vehicle is being serviced.

Here is how our process works from start to finish:

  1. You book online or call (803) 667-8731. We confirm your address, vehicle type, and preferred package.
  2. We arrive at your location fully equipped. Our van carries professional-grade pressure washers, steam cleaners, dual-action polishers, vacuums, pH-balanced chemicals, microfiber towels, and our own fresh water supply. You do not need to provide a hose or power outlet.
  3. We complete the detail on-site. Depending on the package, this takes 2–5 hours. You can go about your day while we work — your car never leaves your sight.
  4. We do a final walkthrough with you. Before we leave, we walk you through every area we worked on so you can confirm you are satisfied.

This is the convenience that makes auto detailing near me searches so popular. You get the same professional-grade results as an in-shop detail without disrupting your schedule. Learn more on our mobile detailing services page.

Mobile Detailing Near Me Prices (2026)

Our pricing is straightforward and posted publicly so you know exactly what to expect when you search detailing near me. Prices are for standard sedans and coupes; SUVs and trucks are priced slightly higher based on size.

Package Starting Price What's Included
Basic Detail $225 Exterior hand wash, interior vacuum, window cleaning, tire dressing
Factory Reset $400 Full interior deep clean, exterior wash + clay bar, hand wax, leather conditioning, odor treatment
Ceramic Coating Custom quote Paint decontamination, paint correction prep, professional ceramic coating application, multi-year protection
Paint Correction Custom quote Single- or multi-stage correction to remove swirl marks, light scratches, and oxidation

For full package details and add-ons, visit our pricing page. All prices are firm — no surprise charges when we arrive.

Where We Provide Mobile Detailing Near You

We cover a 25-mile radius from Columbia SC, which means mobile detailing near me is available across the entire Midlands region. Our service area includes:

  • Columbia SC — Forest Acres, Shandon, Rosewood, Five Points, The Vista, Northeast Columbia, downtown, and all surrounding neighborhoods
  • Lexington SC — Lexington proper, Lake Murray shores, Red Bank, and surrounding Lexington County
  • Irmo — Including Harbison, Dutch Fork, and St. Andrews areas
  • Cayce and West Columbia
  • Blythewood and Chapin
  • Lake Murray area — Ballentine, Prosperity, and surrounding lakefront communities

Not sure if we come to your area? Call (803) 667-8731 and we will confirm. In most cases, if you are within 25 miles of downtown Columbia, we can get car detailing near me scheduled for you quickly — often the same day.

Why Mobile Detailing Beats Going to a Shop

When people search auto detailing near me, they often assume a fixed shop is the better option. Here is why mobile detailing near you is actually the superior choice in most situations:

  • You save time. No driving across town, no drop-off, no waiting room. We come to your home or office while you focus on your day. Most customers save 1–2 hours compared to visiting a shop.
  • Same professional quality. Our mobile setup uses the identical equipment and products as any professional shop. The results are the same — your location just changes.
  • Your car never leaves your property. With a shop detail, your vehicle is driven by strangers and parked in unfamiliar lots. Mobile car detailing near me means your car stays exactly where you left it.
  • Flexible scheduling. We work around your calendar, including early mornings and weekends, rather than forcing you into a shop's limited slots.
  • One-on-one service. You deal directly with your detailer, not a front-desk coordinator. If you have specific concerns about a stain, scratch, or area of the car, you tell us directly before we start.

The only scenario where a fixed shop might have an edge is for services requiring a climate-controlled bay, such as full paint correction on extremely hot or cold days. For all other services, mobile detailing near me is the smarter, more convenient option.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I find the best mobile detailing near me?

To find the best mobile detailing near me, look for detailers with verified Google reviews (4.8 stars or higher), proof of insurance, IDA certification, transparent pricing posted online, and a portfolio of real before-and-after photos. Mikah's Mobile Detailing checks every one of those boxes and serves Columbia, Lexington, Irmo, Cayce, and surrounding areas.

How much does mobile car detailing near me cost?

Mobile car detailing near you in the Columbia and Lexington SC area starts at $225 for our Basic Detail package, which includes a full exterior wash, interior vacuum, windows, and tire dressing. Our most popular package, the Factory Reset, is $400 and covers a deep interior and exterior detail. Ceramic coating and paint correction are quoted individually based on vehicle condition.

Does mobile detailing near me require water and power hookups?

No. Our fully self-contained mobile detailing van carries its own water supply and power equipment, so we can detail your car wherever it is parked — your driveway, office parking lot, or apartment complex. You do not need to provide anything except access to the vehicle.

Is same-day mobile detailing near me available?

Yes. We offer same-day mobile detailing throughout Columbia, Lexington, and the surrounding Midlands area when you call before noon. Reach us at (803) 667-8731 to check availability. Some premium packages such as ceramic coating may require advance scheduling.

What areas do you cover for mobile detailing near me?

We provide mobile detailing near you throughout a 25-mile radius of Columbia SC, including Lexington, Irmo, Cayce, West Columbia, Blythewood, Chapin, and the Lake Murray area. If you are unsure whether we cover your location, call (803) 667-8731 and we will confirm.
